name: Pasta with White Truffles, Olive Oil, Parmesan, and Basil
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Dark Green Extra Virgin Olive Oil
3 tbsp Dark Green Extra Virgin Olive Oil
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot, bring 8 quarts of lightly salted water to a boil.
2. Add the 3 tablespoons of olive oil to the boiling water.
3. Add the pasta to the boiling water and cook until al dente, no more than two minutes.
4. Drain the pasta well.
5. Toss the pasta with the remaining cup of olive oil, half the basil, salt, and pepper to taste.
6. Mound the pasta in the middle of each of 6 heated large serving plates.
7. Sprinkle the pasta with grated Parmesan cheese.
8. With a truffle shaver or swivel-bladed vegetable peeler, shave the truffles over each serving.
9. Garnish with the remaining basil.
